overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a robed character following a goblin NPC through an underground stone complex with industrial mechanical elements. The environment transitions from debris-filled corridors to elevated walkways overlooking massive gear mechanisms, past a burning campfire, and into a dark cylindrical tunnel.

agents.ego_description: following the goblin NPC through the rubble-filled corridor

notable_agents.action: goblin running ahead through the debris and wooden barricades

wooden planks and barriers blocking off side passages
arched stone doorway leading deeper into the underground complex

segments.scene_description: The character follows a goblin NPC through a narrow, debris-filled stone corridor. Wooden barricades and stone rubble line the path as they move toward an archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking mechanical cavern with large gears

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway observing the large mechanical structures in the cavern

notable_agents.action: goblin walking along the path ahead toward the mechanical area

entered.detail: decorative black metal railing with geometric patterns along the walkway edge
massive rotating gear mechanism visible through the cavern opening
tall stone support columns along the left side of the walkway
large archway opening letting in bright light from the cavern beyond

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into an elevated walkway with ornate metal railings, revealing a vast underground cavern. Massive mechanical gears rotate in the distance as bright light streams through large openings, contrasting with the dim interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway junction with campfire and tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching a burning campfire brazier where the goblin waits briefly

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire where the goblin pauses before continuing toward the tunnel

entered.detail: burning fire pit providing warm light in the underground space
dark arched entrance leading into a cylindrical tunnel
vertical red banner with gold trim hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a burning campfire brazier where the goblin waits momentarily. A red banner hangs nearby as the path leads toward a dark tunnel entrance, leaving the mechanical cavern behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cylindrical stone tunnel with metal rail tracks

events.description: entering the dark cylindrical tunnel from the open walkway area

agents.ego_description: entering the dark cylindrical tunnel following the goblin deeper underground

notable_agents.action: goblin walking ahead into the darkness of the tunnel

entered.detail: curved stone walls with horizontal ring patterns forming the tunnel interior
metal tracks running along the center of the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark cylindrical tunnel with curved stone walls and metal rail tracks. The space becomes enclosed and dimly lit as they follow the goblin deeper into the underground complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic stone corridor that opens into a vast mechanical cavern before descending back into a dark, enclosed tunnel. It begins by trailing a goblin NPC through a narrow passage cluttered with wooden barricades and stone rubble toward a distant archway. As the character passes through the arch, the scene expands onto an elevated walkway with ornate railings, revealing a massive underground void where giant gears rotate beneath streams of bright light. The camera then moves past a burning campfire brazier and a red banner, shifting away from the open machinery toward a looming dark entrance. Finally, the environment closes in again as the character enters a cylindrical tunnel with curved stone walls and metal rail tracks, following the goblin deeper into the dim underground complex.
